name: Quick-add resilience & smart defaults
description: POST-MVP — extend quick-add with offline-queue (IndexedDB-backed pending queue synced on reconnect), smart category defaults via recent-usage heuristics, and per-user last-used-source persistence in user preferences. Moved out of MVP scope on 2026-04-22 because offline-first and heuristic logic add significant complexity that is not required for initial launch. Implement after feat-024 is stable in production. Per docs/product-specs/quick-add-experience.md.
